name: Mirel Volcán Calderón
title: Web Developer | CRM Specialist | Environmental Data Analyst
summary: Professional with over 20 years of experience across diverse environments, combining technology, sustainability and strategy. Specialized in web development, CRM solutions and environmental data analysis.
skills: CRM and automation: Salesforce, Trailhead, Odoo
Data analysis and GIS: QGIS, ArcGIS, geospatial tools
Project management and multidisciplinary team facilitation
Linux environments, Git and version control

experience.description: Conducted socio-environmental research, consumer preference modeling and sustainability-focused studies.
Salesforce Ranger with certifications in Associate, Administrator, Platform App Builder and Service Cloud.

publications.title: From Scientific Research to CRM with Environmental Purpose
publications.description: International publication based on my master's research analyzing consumer preferences for ecolabeled and organic products in Costa Rica using Choice Experiments.

environmental_experience.context: Participation in projects with PDVSA, USAID, BID and universities, integrating citizen science, spatial data and conservation.

crm_transition.description: Applying technical and analytical background to CRM solution design with environmental impact.
